message:
fix: handle repos without git remote gracefully

UBS was crashing with `Error (exit 1) line 1754: return` when scanning
projects without a configured git remote. The `resolve_git_metadata`
function has bare `return` statements that exit with non-zero status
when git commands fail, which gets caught by `set -Eeuo pipefail`.

Git metadata is optional for security scanning, so we now allow the
function to fail gracefully with `|| true`.

Fixes Dicklesworthstone/agentic_coding_flywheel_setup#26

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1751,7 +1751,7 @@ check_and_update_self(){
 }
 
 finalize_module_dir
-resolve_git_metadata
+resolve_git_metadata || true  # Git metadata is optional; don't fail on repos without remotes
 
 if [[ "$MODE" == "doctor" ]]; then
   run_doctor "$DOCTOR_FIX"
